title: Agent mode in Genie Agents will soon be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Agent mode in Genie Agents will be enabled by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled in July 2026.

Agentic mode uses multi-step reasoning to answer complex business questions by running multiple SQL queries, iterating on results, and returning a report with citations, visualizations, and supporting tables. See [Agent mode in Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/agent-mode).
